title: Java Technical Lead
description:
about the company:
Our client is a leading player in the financial services industry with a strong regional presence. They are committed to driving innovation through technology and delivering efficient, reliable solutions for their wealth management business. With an inclusive and collaborative culture, they offer opportunities for professionals to work on impactful projects in a dynamic environment.

about the job:
As a Technical Lead, you will spearhead the delivery of high-performance satellite applications and core banking modules. This role is a hybrid of strategic technical leadership and hands-on engineering. You will be responsible for:

  • Leading a team of 4-5 developers through the full SDLC within a SAFe Agile environment.
  • Driving technical roadmaps, enforcing architectural integrity, and challenging existing frameworks to ensure scalability and security.
  • Acting as the bridge between technical teams and business change engineers to ensure project milestones are met with quality.
  • Managing risks and issues proactively while ensuring all local developments meet stringent global banking standards.
  • Promoting modern engineering practices like CI/CD, containerization, and automated testing to optimize delivery.

skills and experience required:

  • Extensive experience (ideally 12-15+ years) in full-stack development, with a strong emphasis on back-end architecture and front-end integration.
  • Deep proficiency in Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, and JBOSS.
  • Practical experience with Kubernetes (PKS), containerization, and event-driven streaming using Kafka.
  • Strong mastery of Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) and RESTful API development.
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (GitLab, Maven, Octopus) and code quality tools like SonarQube.
  • Solid understanding of SQL (Oracle, MySQL, or Postgres) and data structures.
  • Prior experience in Wealth Management, Private Banking, or Corporate Actions is highly advantageous.

To apply online please use the apply function, alternatively you may contact Dalpreet Kaur at dalpreet.kaur@randstad.com.sg (EA: 94C3609 /R23111951)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
